creator: mg@fork.pl
text:
I'm not sure what "cleared up by now" means but I can see this on
10-RELEASE/amd64:

checking for iconv_open... yes

undefined reference to `libiconv'

undefined reference to `libiconv_close'

undefined reference to `libiconv_open'
